description_long: This is a modern, sporty yellow motorcycle with a streamlined body and aggressive styling, suitable for urban commuting or recreational riding. The motorcycle features a prominent front fairing with dual mirrors, a clear windscreen, and a headlight integrated into the front cowl. The side profile reveals a sculpted fuel tank, exposed engine components, and a black, two-piece seat designed for both rider and passenger comfort. The rear section is compact, with a raised tail, integrated taillight, and a visible license plate holder. The wheels are large, black, and fitted with disc brakes, while the exhaust system is mounted low and runs parallel to the frame. The overall build suggests a combination of metal, plastic, and rubber materials, with a focus on durability and performance.
description: A sporty yellow motorcycle with a streamlined body, black wheels, and a compact rear section, designed for urban riding. It features a sculpted fuel tank, dual mirrors, and a two-piece seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive headlight, dual mirrors, windscreen, and the front tire aligned with the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted fuel tank, exposed engine, black wheels, and the full length of the seat and exhaust.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the raised tail, integrated taillight, license plate, and the rear tire.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the engine, suspension spring, exhaust system, and the overall streamlined profile.
